entries.definition: large in amount, size, value, or importance; considerable
entries.exampleSentence: The company made a substantial profit in the last quarter, exceeding all expectations.

entries.definition: solid, strong, and sturdy in construction or build
entries.exampleSentence: The old oak table was substantial enough to survive three generations of family dinners.

entries.definition: real and tangible; having substance rather than being imaginary
entries.exampleSentence: The police needed substantial evidence before they could make an arrest.
